DermaSoZo  ·  Logo Refinement

Round Two.
Built from your feedback.

Six refined directions — every one shaped directly by the owners' notes on Round One. All artwork below is true vector: razor-sharp from a business card to a billboard.

What You Asked For

Every note, answered.

✓

"Option 2 is appealing — Classic"

Round Two is built entirely on Option 2's DNA — its serif "derma" and script "SoZo" are the foundation of every direction below.

✓

"SoZo should stand out, in teal"

The script SoZo stays in deep teal in all six options, with its sweeping z-tail underline intact.

✓

"derma in bold coral or bold navy"

Each crest is shown with both wordmark colorways — emboldened navy and emboldened coral, same Classic serif.

✓

"We like the circle crest with the hand"

The cupped-hand crest returns in every option — now with heavier linework and a bolder ring so it pops at any size.

✓

"Show the lotus solid — and outlined"

Two crest treatments: a solid coral lotus and a refined line-art (outlined) lotus.

✓

"2oz blue bottle, white label"

All product mockups now show your actual packaging: a 2 fl oz cobalt spray bottle with a white label.

The Six Directions

Choose your crest & colorway.

Options A–D are stacked lockups (crest above wordmark). Options E–F are horizontal lockups for letterheads, website headers, and signage.

AClassic Navy · Solid LotusStacked

The flagship. Bold navy "derma" anchors the mark with clinical authority; the solid coral lotus gives the crest a warm, confident focal point. The strongest all-round performer.

Reversed / On Navy
2oz Bottle
BWarm Coral · Solid LotusStacked

The emotional colorway. Coral "derma" leads with warmth and approachability — the recovery promise made visible — while teal SoZo keeps the clinical anchor.

Reversed / On Navy
2oz Bottle
CClassic Navy · Outlined LotusStacked

The refined take. The line-art lotus reads lighter and more editorial — a quieter luxury cue that pairs beautifully with the navy wordmark.

Reversed / On Navy
2oz Bottle
DWarm Coral · Outlined LotusStacked

The lightest, most modern pairing — outlined lotus plus coral wordmark. Feels closest to premium spa retail.

Reversed / On Navy
2oz Bottle
EHorizontal · Navy / Solid LotusHorizontal Lockup

Companion lockup for website headers, email signatures, and letterhead — whichever stacked option wins, its horizontal twin comes with it.

Reversed / On Navy
FHorizontal · Coral / Outlined LotusHorizontal Lockup

The horizontal expression of the coral + line-art direction.

Reversed / On Navy
On Your Packaging

The 2oz bottle, side by side.

Your current cobalt bottle with white label, wearing each stacked direction. Note how the bolder crest holds its detail even at label scale.

Your Turn

Which direction is the one?

Reply with a letter — A through F — plus any fine-tuning notes. The winning mark ships as a complete asset kit: full-color, reversed, one-color, favicon, and social variants.
